description_long: This object is a military-style rifle with a black metal receiver, a wooden handguard, and a distinctive curved magazine. The stock is a skeletonized metal folding type, designed for compactness and portability. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a large cylindrical muzzle device, likely a suppressor or grenade launcher attachment. The rifle features iron sights mounted along the top, and the trigger, magazine release, and safety selector are all visible. The overall finish is a mix of matte black metal and dark wood, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A black and wood military-style rifle with a folding metal stock, curved magazine, and a large muzzle device.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical muzzle device and narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length, wooden handguard, curved magazine, and folding metal stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine, trigger, and details of the folding stock and muzzle device.
